title: Sheepies CPVP Texture Pack
description: A clean CPVP Texture Pack inspired by Bare Bones
body:
This is a **CPVP** Texture Pack inspired by the Texture Pack **Bare Bones!**

Every Texture is Handdrawn, simple and clean.

![All CPVP Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/223013a145e680102ff3b6c7b30462adae1ba82d.png)
![Player Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3774ea47e7d309027999b3302ede24f5534bf774.png)

This Texture Pack is recommended to use with the **SHEEPIES CPVP SOUNDPACK** 
found on **CURSE FORGE**
[Download Sheepies CPVP Soundpack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/sheepies-cpvp-soundpack)

**PLEASE REPORT BUGS OR ISSUES IMMEDIATELY!**
